name: Chinese Cashew Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 can (10.75 oz) cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except chow mein noodles in a Crock-Pot.
2. Stir well to mix.
3. Cover and cook on Low for 5 to 9 hours or on High for 2 to 3 hours.
4. Serve over chow mein noodles.
Serves 4
